---
title: use-slices-sort
description: "Prefer slices.Sort over sort.Slice."
---

<!-- Code generated by docs/scripts/generate-lint-docs.go; DO NOT EDIT. -->

Prefer slices.Sort over sort.Slice. Strider default: enabled.

## Bad

```go
sort.Slice(values, func(i, j int) bool { return values[i] < values[j] })
```

## Good

```go
slices.Sort(values)
```

## Enable

This extended rule runs when selected with `--only use-slices-sort`, enabled in `strider.toml`, or included with `--all-rules`. The default severity is `warning`.
